Struct NVAPIPstateClockEntryDto

Namespace
NVAPIWrapper

NVAPIWrapper.dll

Per-clock entry DTO for a P-state, wrapping NV_GPU_PSTATE20_CLOCK_ENTRY_V1.

public readonly struct NVAPIPstateClockEntryDto : IEquatable<NVAPIPstateClockEntryDto>

DomainId

Clock domain identifier.

public _NV_GPU_PUBLIC_CLOCK_ID DomainId { get; }

_NV_GPU_PUBLIC_CLOCK_ID

FreqDeltaMax

Maximum allowed frequency delta in kHz.

public int FreqDeltaMax { get; }

Property Value

int

FreqDeltaMin

Minimum allowed frequency delta in kHz.

public int FreqDeltaMin { get; }

Property Value

int

FreqDeltaValue

Current frequency delta adjustment in kHz.

public int FreqDeltaValue { get; }

Property Value

int

IsEditable

True if this clock entry is editable.

public bool IsEditable { get; }

Property Value

bool

MaxFreqKHz

Maximum frequency in kHz; valid only for RANGE type.

public uint MaxFreqKHz { get; }

Property Value

uint

MinFreqKHz

Minimum frequency in kHz. For SINGLE type, this is the single frequency value (overlaps data.single.freq_kHz). For RANGE type, this is the minimum.

public uint MinFreqKHz { get; }

Property Value

uint

RangeMaxVoltageUv

Maximum voltage in microvolts; valid only for RANGE type.

public uint RangeMaxVoltageUv { get; }

Property Value

uint

RangeMinVoltageUv

Minimum voltage in microvolts; valid only for RANGE type.

public uint RangeMinVoltageUv { get; }

Property Value

uint

RangeVoltageDomainId

Voltage domain identifier; valid only for RANGE type.

_NV_GPU_PERF_VOLTAGE_INFO_DOMAIN_ID

TypeId
